title: Checklist command
description: Add spec-graph checklist <story-id> command that generates .spec-graph/checklists/<story-id>.md with 5 mechanical checks (REQ mapping, scope atomicity, AC count, REQ resolution, path safety) and 5 soft checks (no ambiguous adjectives, each AC verifiable, edge cases considered, dependencies declared, out-of-scope explicit). Gate can require checklist completion. Prevents underspecified stories from entering implementation phase.

audit_log.message: profile patched, graph recomposed, state primed
